name: nikolaj/d7-to-d11-migration-kit
description: Drop-in migration module for Drupal 7 to Drupal 11 with ready-made YAML configs and custom process plugins for common pain points.

suggest.drupal/paragraphs: Required if migrating D7 field_collection items into D11 paragraphs.
suggest.drupal/redirect: Required if migrating D7 redirect module data.
suggest.drupal/media_migration: Required when migrating D7 file-attached fields into D11 media entities.
